reviews.review_description: After playing the game, I have some constructive criticism, and before I do I just wanna say, I know it’s in beta. But knowing this, before it’s released, here are some cool things you guys could add. First off, the setting/multiplayer. I don’t know what you guys have in mind for multiplayer, but I think it’d be cool if there was a lodge where you could hang out with your friends. Also a way to go back to the main menu without finishing the coarse. Another good feature would be a slope difficulty rating system. Another cool feature would be if when you crouch, you go faster.

developer_response.body: Hello and thanks for taking the time to give feedback/suggestions. Traditional slope difficulty ratings will exist in the full game (green, blue, red, black). For multiplayer, no real-time or social features are planned for the initial paid release. Multiplayer will be limited to high score stuff and ghost players. A crouch speed boost sounds awesome! I'll do some experimentation with that.

reviews.review_description: Nothing to say except ADD THE SNOWBOARD :-) and improve the graphics...

developer_response.body: Thanks! The snowboard is coming but getting the controls to work equally good for snowboards are a big challenge.

reviews.review_title: One of my new favorite experiences
reviews.review_description: I love the mechanics of this and can't wait for a full version.  Feels nice and I can see the potential.  Would be cool if a feature to listen to my own music came to fruition eventually, but as it is...fantastic work.

Thank you for making this game!

It actually does feel similar to skiing with crouches, turns and jumps. It just felt natural and immersive to me. I’m not “good” but had tons of fun with the demo just skiing around. A zen mode in this would be an awesome add. As a tip to others: try it in a full crouch and you’ll get a good leg workout in too!

Excited for the full release!

This game is alot of fun. I was not expecting much for this but I was great. You can't beat the real thing but this is fun for year round. For the full game, I would enjoy seeing a snowboard level, or a whole section for it. Also a terrain park would be cool.
This is already a great skiing experience. The night level was very fun and overall I'm excited to pay top dollar for the full release!!! Keep it up devs!!!

developer_response.body: Thanks, that makes me very happy to hear! A paid release is in the making.

reviews.review_description:
Surprisingly extremely immersive. 
The developer has done an amazing job at making this feel like you’re actually skiing which is impressive considering there’s no tracking on your legs. 
The feeling of cruising through the slopes and going for a few jumps is so much fun.
Looking forward to the final version!
Thank you.

developer_response.body: Makes me very happy to hear!

reviews.review_description: i cannot wait for the full release! the artstyle is amazing, the environments are beautiful, the skiing is fun, the music is outstanding, and all i want is more!

developer_response.body: Thanks! There will soon be a transition to an early access version of the game that initially will contain more slopes, race types, different skis and general QoL/polish. And get continues updates.

reviews.review_description: This is an absolute gem of a game. The way you control the turns, the speed and the soundtrack Combine to create one of the most unique and best experiences on the quest. Can't wait for even more awesome levels, would love a day and night mode too.

developer_response.body: Thanks! I'm glad you're enjoying the game. There's a paid release in the making. It will contain more levels, modes, gear, etc. And it will bet continues updates.

reviews.review_description: Pretty nice, good background music, amazing graphics, and very calming. Yet there is still room for improvement, but still a great game.

I’ve never skied once, but this is a great experience.  Hands down the most visceral game I’ve played in VR.  I am usually hesitant to try stuff with intense motion content, as I can get a bit of sickness, but no such problem here.  It convinced my brain that my body was moving enough to create actual sensation.  Especially the jumps.  More of them please!  Carving between gates is one of those simple fun actions that will likely not get old.  It reminds me a bit of Synth Riders in that it just feels good to play.  I do wish that the tracks were much longer.  I hope that there will be an endless mode with proceedural courses.  Or a free ski where you can’t run out of stamina and dont have to worry about the gates.  I definitely appriciate that there is a workout to be had here as well.  While I dont believe that it is neccessary, I used the poles constantly which worked up a sweat.  One detail with this aspect is that I tried to duck under one of the fallen trees to avoid it and work my legs, but it registered as a hit anyway.  Would be nice  to have that option.  This is a small complaint, but I feel like the human character that you can see on the level select area should be a realistically proportioned attractive girl or guy, and not that terrifying lumpy cartoon mutant thing!  The only other thing that could improve it is if there was a simple storyline, preferably one lifted any 80’s ski movie where you have to  beat the arrogant rich-kid ski champ.  Oh, and the soundtrack is really good.  All in all, a great start.  I’ll definitly be playing more and buying the full version.

This game is amazing, I got it from sidequest not expecting much as it is unable to fully track my body, however it excellently captures that feeling of skiing down a mountain in the alps. The scenery is not extremely realistic but that does not bother me as you end up focusing on trying to get down the slope as fast as possible to get on the leaderboard. The main races feel good and trying to get through all of the gates can be difficult at times forcing you to concentrate on the environment around you to avoid trees and rocks to keep your chain going. The turning mechanics in this game fell like how you would turn when skiing in real life and this game can be tiring after playing for a while. I cannot wait for this game to be released and it is likely the closest I will get to actually skiing this year. I would love to see more, longer slopes in the future and maybe even being able to use that snowboard on the coming soon section.

developer_response.body: Hello, thanks for give such detailed feedback! More slopes, gear, and type of races will be included in the "early access" version soon to be released.

reviews.review_description: Its a great game dont get me wrong but i just wish there was a mode where you could snowboard and a mode where you could free ski as in dont worry about staying alive and just have fun

I’ve skied before but I need to practice more in VR.  I wish there were bunny slopes to get used to this.  I keep nearly falling forward. But this game looks great and will be a lot fun after some practice
Hi everybody , i try this apps today and its really a great game. Congratulations to the team  ! cant wait for the snowboard !!!    by
I don’t have the app yet but I can’t download it stuck on installing plss help

Fantastic game. I love that the developers are thinking outside the box and creating a new and unique experience. Good for you and I hope you are rewarded for your efforts. There is a lot to like about this game and a lot of ways to improve it. Number one is better graphics. They are so poor I lose immersion in the game. I would love to see some more Physics added to the game. I.E. The more you go straight down the hill without turning the faster you go and the less sharper you can turn thus missing gates or flying off the cliff. The faster you go the higher you fly off the knoll. I am an expert skier but my jumping days are long over. Would love to be able to jump higher in the game. There are plenty of other things I would love to see but then it would sound like I was being critical. The game is wonderful and I cannot wait to see where it goes. Thanks developers for creating something new. Good luck!!

Wasn’t really expecting much from this but don’t mind admitting I was wrong. The movement and feel in the game are great. Considering the tracking is all from the headset, your leg positions really add  to the turning ability. Like others have mentioned, I found a bit of drifting to the right but not so much that it detracted from the game. I realise that it’s in Beta and still has work to be done to it. Fleshing out the surrounding visuals etc and adding sound effects should make this an awesome game and, as I’m a skier who can’t get skiing due to the pesky Covid right now, I’m really looking forward to seeing where this game ends up. Cheers devs.

developer_response.body: Hello, thanks for your kind words! I've received some really useful debug info on the drifting issue. Hopefully I will get that fixed in the next path.

reviews.review_title: Looks so cool but got motion sickness
reviews.review_description: Immediately pulls you into thinking you're flying/speed is ridiculously great but I got thrown off and couldn't hack it.   Sucks for me because looks sooooo cool.

reviews.review_title: Beautiful Game with one Major Issue
reviews.review_description: I love almost everything about the game. It’s built very well, it’s astoundingly beautiful, it makes my body feel like it does when I’ve actually gone skiing. But, at least for me on the Quest 2, it is significantly harder I turn right than it was to turn left. I would imagine it’s difficult to make a proper turning system without tracking our legs, so I’m understanding of this issue, but when I can turn a harsh left fairly easily, but can’t turn right at all unless I’m practically falling over, it can make it rather difficult to enjoy as much as it should be.

developer_response.body: Hello and thanks for the feedback! Hello. This issue with “control bias” towards one side is the bane of my existence. I can’t reproduce the problem myself and I’ve never received any footage showing the problem. If you have the time and energy I’d be super great full if you could record a short video and just mail it to me at petter.nygren@sutur.io I’d really like to eliminate this before the next patch.
